settings.heading: Real People. Real Stories.
settings.subheading: These aren't cherry-picked testimonials. They're verified buyers — people who tried 100 Cal Snacks and came back to tell others what happened.

settings.transparency_note: We show all reviews — including the critical ones.

settings.quote: I've tried every protein bar on the market and they all taste like sweetened cardboard or make me feel nauseous from the sugar alcohols. 100 Cal Snacks tastes like something I'd actually choose to eat — and I've been hitting my protein goals consistently for the first time in years.

I'm a nutritionist and I'm extremely skeptical of 'healthy' snack claims. The macros on these bars are legitimately impressive — not fudged by tiny serving sizes or hidden ingredients. The peanut butter flavor actually tastes like peanut butter.
I didn't think a savory protein snack could be this good. The BBQ puffs have replaced my afternoon chips entirely. Same satisfying crunch, but I'm not feeling guilty or bloated afterward.
Subscribed after my second order. The consistency is what got me — every bar tastes the same, which means they're actually manufacturing this with care. Most protein bars vary wildly batch to batch.
Finally a bar that doesn't make me feel like I compromised. I eat clean but I have a massive sweet tooth. These let me have something sweet at 3pm without derailing my macros.

settings.title: Actually Tastes Like a Treat
settings.body: Bought these skeptically, ate one and immediately ordered the 20-pack. They don't taste like 'diet food'. They taste like a brownie.

settings.title: The Real Deal
settings.body: Macros don't lie. These are legitimately 100 calories with real fiber and protein. I've been burned by 'healthy' snacks before. This one's different.

settings.title: My Daily 3pm Habit
settings.body: I'm never going back to regular snacks. The chocolate flavor satisfies my sweet tooth without the sugar crash.

settings.title: Better Than I Expected
settings.body: Skeptical of the claims but they're legitimate. The peanut butter flavor is strong, not artificial. Exactly what it says on the label.

settings.title: Subscribed Immediately
settings.body: Ordered once, got hooked. The nutritionist in me wanted to find something wrong with the label and couldn't.

settings.title: Satisfying Without the Guilt
settings.body: Peanut butter is notoriously hard to get right in snack bars. This one nails it — actually tastes like peanut butter, not peanut flavoring.

settings.title: Replaced My Afternoon Chips
settings.body: I'm a savory snacker. These BBQ puffs are the only protein snack I've found that satisfies the same craving chips do.

settings.title: Crunchy, Savory, Addictive
settings.body: The texture is perfect — light and crunchy like puffs should be. The BBQ flavor is smoky and balanced.

settings.title: Game Changer for Savory Snackers
settings.body: Every protein snack I've tried before was sweet. Finding a savory option with these macros is a game changer.

settings.heading: We Heard You.
settings.intro: We read every review — including the ones that sting a little. Here's some critical feedback we've received, and what we did with it. We show these because hiding them would be easier, and that's not how we do things.

settings.title: Too Dense for Me
settings.review_text: The taste is fine but the texture is heavier than I expected — more like a meal replacement than a snack. I wanted something I could eat in two bites.
settings.response_text: That's fair. Our bars are intentionally dense because the fiber and protein content is real — that's what makes them filling at 100 calories. If you prefer something lighter, our BBQ Puffs have an airy texture that might suit you better.

settings.title: Shipping Was Slow
settings.review_text: The product itself is great — 5 stars. But my order took 11 days to arrive and I couldn't find a tracking update for the first 6 days.
settings.response_text: This was a fulfillment issue on our end during a high-demand period — we've since moved to a 2-day shipping default for all Amazon orders. We emailed everyone who experienced the delay. If you were affected and didn't hear from us, reach out at hello@100calsnacks.com.
